title: Developing a Model of Islamic Psychology and Psychotherapy
book: Developing a Model of Islamic Psychology and Psychotherapy

node_types.description: A human individual, including clients, therapists, scholars, and family members relevant to Islamic psychotherapy.

properties.name: role
properties.description: Role of the person (e.g., client, therapist, scholar, family_member, shaykh)

properties.name: religiosity_level
properties.description: Degree of religious commitment or practice

properties.name: cultural_background
properties.description: Cultural or ethnic background

properties.name: spiritual_state
properties.description: Current spiritual state or stage of the soul

properties.name: training
properties.description: Relevant training or expertise (e.g., Islamic studies, psychotherapy)
